caption: A man with glasses and a tall, silver-grey, spiked hairstyle speaks into a black microphone in a studio setting. He wears a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders, along with black over-ear headphones. The background consists of a wall covered in various framed photographs and a clothing rack featuring shirts, including one with the brand "LEE" visible. On-screen logos appear on the left and right sides of the frame; the left logo reads "STALKID PODCAST" and the right logo reads "BOSS TALK JOY". As the scene progresses, the man continues to speak, slightly shifting his facial expression and head position while remaining seated in the same location. The camera angle and the placement of the equipment and background remain static throughout the sequence.
